achievements.title: Pirate's Property Only
achievements.description: From the beginning of Pirate Ship, reach the boss without collecting any gems (including treasure chests!).

achievements.title: Aquaphobic
achievements.description: From the beginning of Otarucean 2, reach the boss under 1:30.

achievements.description: In Burning Hamlet 1, collect all 246 gems (including treasure boxes!).

achievements.description: Find the hidden alcove with an extra life in Mt. Chester 1.

achievements.title: Worker's Safety
achievements.description: Reach Frozen Palace 2's boss without harming any enemies (resets upon game over).

achievements.title: Unscathed Expedition
achievements.description: Clear Mr. Bernardo 1 from the beginning without taking damage.
achievements.author: FlamingRok
